question: Will TISZA party win the 2026 Hungarian elections and get 50%+1 member of the parliment and gain voting majority?
resolution_criteria: Hungary has parlimentary elections on 12 Apr 2026. The results are expected for 13 Apr 2026. The Hungarian parliment consits of 199 members. TISZA party will need to get 100 members to have majority. TISZA party is the largest opposition party against Orban's fidesz party.
